input.command: kubectl get sts mongodb-replica -n mongodb -o wide; echo "---"; kubectl get pods -n mongodb -o wide; echo "---"; kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name+" -> "+m.stateStr))' 2>&1

content.text: Confirmed current state: 3-member replica set, healthy. Now I'll scale the StatefulSet to 5 replicas.

input.command:
kubectl scale statefulset mongodb-replica -n mongodb --replicas=5
kubectl rollout status statefulset/mongodb-replica -n mongodb --timeout=180s 2>&1
